channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's Revealing On-Air Meltdown
item.description: The president's insecurities are clearly visible regarding January 6 and the 2020 election.

item.title: Do Conservatives Care to Have a Conscience?
item.description: Mike Pence referenced the declaration by which we are most likely to be judged.

item.title: Pro-Democrat group sues to halt UFC fight on White House lawn on Trump's birthday
item.description: A Democrat-leaning group is suing to stop the UFC fight at the White House next weekend, calling it a deeply corrupt event involving the president.

item.title: Pro-China Rich Guy Neville Roy Singham Draws Growing Scrutiny Over Far-Left Activism
item.description: Using American-made money from Shanghai as a far-left activist, Singham supports various narrative-influencing operations.
